validation_summary.warning_page_click_blocked_reason: Playwright click timed out waiting for scheduled navigation to finish after the outbound warning-page click.

key_outcome: RUN12 spent the single authorized live capture and proved the broadened warning-page inventory can find and click the real host-matching outbound anchor, but the run still blocked because the click path timed out waiting for scheduled navigation before the post-click transition polling could observe the signer surface.
blockers: The live warning-page anchor is now identified and clicked, but the click path blocks on Playwright's navigation wait before the existing post-click transition polling can observe the resulting page state.
No fresh Physical Operating Address post-toggle artifacts were produced, so field-local label proof remains blocked.
uncertainty: It is not yet confirmed whether separating the outbound click from navigation waiting will allow the existing safe-redirect transition polling to observe the live post-click state cleanly.
The next best step is a source/test-only change to the click/wait behavior before another live capture is authorized.
next_recommendation: Run PHYSICALADDRESSCAPTUREEMAILRUNNER-20260513-RUN13 to adjust the broadened warning-page click path so it does not block on click-time navigation waiting before `waitForSafeRedirectTransition()` can observe the post-click state, and validate that change under focused tests before any further authorized live capture.
